rulings.Case Title: JASON TRAVIS VS. HARRIETT M WILSON
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday April 18, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT HARRIETT WILSON, THE HARRIETT M. WILSON TRUST DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) as to each element of the cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotion Distress including intentional outrageous conduct and nature or extent of mental suffering. = (501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: JASON TRAVIS VS. HARRIETT M WILSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday April 18, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT HARRIETT WILSON, THE HARRIETT M. WILSON TRUST Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) to support malice, oppression or fraud. = (501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: CHAN 1985 TRUST VS. LAI FONG LEONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Lai Fong Leong'S Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday April 18, 2018, line 5. DEFENDANT LAI FONG LEONG Defendant Lai Fong Leong'S Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees DENIED. There is no prevailing party in this action. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that the Court may make a determination as to the defense of discrimination on a motion for attorney's fees re: prevailing party after the matter has been dismissed and judgment of dismissal has been entered. = (501/ACM)
